text:
In the middle of nowhere.

There. I love those words. There in the dense woods. It wouldn't have mattered so much if I couldn't hear them. They were quiet tonight, just as they always were. Soft whispers like the wind. That made them even more eerie.

Oh, it had to happen eventually. Something terrible. They'd come at night.

Something. They always knew what something was.

They wouldn't just pass by. No, nothing like that. They'd grab it. Hands tight. Eyes wide. And something soft between their fingers.

They liked that. Something soft. Something small. They'd hold it tight.

Until they couldn't.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
